notes.head: Attack was evenly contested
notes.body: Both pairs held the offence a similar share of the time (Goh Sze Fei / Nur Izzuddin 51% · Muhammad Rian Ardianto / Fajar Alfian 62%).

notes.head: Fajar Alfian hunts the net
notes.body: At the front for 71% of set-1 in-rally frames — Muhammad Rian Ardianto mostly covers the rear. A defined front/back split is harder to break down than a 50/50 pair.
